title: German Shrimp Skewers
description: A peppery and fluffy German dish featuring shrimp, infused oil, and a special shrimp paste, perfect for showing off at any gathering, this dish is also nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together shrimp paste, infused oil, black pepper, garlic powder, onion powder, and salt.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the shrimp paste mixture.
Thread the shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Brush the grill with butter to prevent sticking.
Grill the shrimp skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are pink and cooked through.
Brush the shrimp with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Serve the shrimp skewers hot, garnished with lemon wedges and parsley if desired.
